name: Admetica
description: Assessment of ADMET Properties
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: Alation
description: Integration with the Alation data catalog.
author: Volodymyr Dyma

name: ApiSamples
description: API Samples

name: ApiTests
description: Automated tests for the [Datagrok JS API](https://datagrok.ai/js-api)
author: Alexander Paramonov

name: Arrow
description: Provides support for the Parquet and Feather file formats.
author: Pavlo Polovyi

name: BenchlingLink
description: Enables seamless interaction with the Benchling platform
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Bio
description: Bioinformatics support (import/export of sequences, conversion, visualization, analysis). [See more](https://github.com/datagrok-ai/public/blob/master/packages/Bio/README.md) for details.
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: Biologics
description: Demo Database wrapper for ADCs
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: BioNeMo
description: Advanced models for protein structure prediction and molecular docking
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: BiostructureViewer
description: Protein viewers: support for multiple file formats, stand-alone viewer, and in-grid viewer.
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: Boltz1
description: Integrates Datagrok with Boltz-1
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: CddVaultLink
description: Integration with CDD Vault registration system
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Charts
description: Charts package provides visualizations built using the [ECharts](https://echarts.apache.org/en/index.html) library.
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: Chem
description: Cheminformatics support: import, rendering, sketching, calculation of properties, predictive models, augmentations, multiple analyses.
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Chembl
description: ChEMBL integration, commonly used queries and browser
author: Maria Dolotova

name: ChemblAPI
description: Similarity and substructure search in ChEMBL using its API
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Chemspace
description: Integration with Chemspace. Allows to search for molecules available in Chemspace, and provides contextual information for the current molecule.
author: Maria Dolotova

name: ClinicalCase
description: Analysis of the clinical data represented in the [SDTM](https://www.cdisc.org/standards/foundational/sdtm) and [SEND](https://www.cdisc.org/standards/foundational/send) formats.
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Compute
description: Legacy modeling UI
author: Andrey Sharapov

name: Compute2
description: Provides modeling UI and Workflows [Documentaion](https://datagrok.ai/help/compute/)
author: Andrey Sharapov

name: CruddyDemo
description: Database-driven apps: define entities, browse/edit data, filters, privileges, events.
author: Andrew Skalkin

name: Curves
description: Curves provides support for fitted curves (such as dose-response curves), including in-grid rendering, storing charts in cells, interactivity, and automatic fitting.
author: Dmytro Kovalyov

name: CVMTests
description: Automated CVM tests
author: Pavlo Polovyi

name: DBTests
description: Automated tests for JDBC Providers
author: Pavlo Polovyi

name: Dendrogram
description: Computation and visualization of hierarchical data clustering. [Learn more](https://github.com/datagrok-ai/public/blob/master/packages/Dendrogram/README.md)
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: DevTools
description: Tools for the Datagrok developers (TestManager, DevPanel).
author: Dmytro Kovalyov

name: DiffStudio
description: Environment for in-browser modeling with ordinary differential equations.
author: Viktor Makarichev

name: Docking
description: Integrates Datagrok with molecular docking algorithms and tools.
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: DrugBank
description: Molecular similarity and substructure search capabilities in the [DrugBank](https://go.drugbank.com/) [Open Structures](https://go.drugbank.com/releases/latest#open-data) dataset.
author: Maria Dolotova

name: EDA
description: Exploratory Data Analysis Tools
author: Viktor Makarichev

name: EpsViewer
description: File viewer for Encapsulated PostScript (EPS) files
author: Datagrok

name: Excalidraw
description: Excalidraw sketcher integration for Datagrok
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: FileEditors
description: Support for previewing and opening text file formats (PDF, DOCX, TEX)
author: Dmytro Kovalyov

name: Flow
description: Flow package
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: GenomeBrowser
description: Provides visualization of genomic data along with its annotations

name: GIS
description: GIS (geographic information system) functionality, such as maps and geocoding.

name: Grokky
description: Grokky AI assistant for Datagrok
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: Helm
description: Provides support for HELM notation (importing, detecting, rendering, conversion).
author: Maria Dolotova

name: HitTriage
description: Hit Triage helps chemists assess the quality of hits and decide which compounds should make it to the next stage.
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: JiraConnect
description: Pakcages for Jira integration into Datagrok
author: Dmytro Kovalyov

name: KetcherSketcher
description: Adds [Ketcher](https://lifescience.opensource.epam.com/ketcher/index.html) as an optional molecular sketcher.

name: KnimeLink
description: Enables seamless interaction with the KNIME analytics platform
author: Maria Dolotova

name: LibTests
description: Automated tests for libraries
author: Andrey Sharapov

name: Media
description: File viewers for browser-supported audio and video formats
author: Datagrok

name: MetabolicGraph
description: Metabolic graph visualizations and analysis
author: Dmytro Kovalyov

name: Minitab
description: Support for Minitab files
author: Andrew Skalkin

name: MLFlow
description: MLflow integration package
author: Dmytro Kovalyov

name: MolTrack
description: Enables registering, tracking, and searching chemical compounds and batches.
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: monomerDB
description: monomerDB description
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: NLP
description: Natural Language Processing Package
author: Alexander Paramonov

name: nmrium
description: Datagrok package for NMR data visualization
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: NodeJSDemo
description: NodeJS Datagrok API demo
author: Pavlo Polovyi

name: Notebooks
description: JupyterLab Notebooks integration package
author: Alexander Paramonov

name: OligoBatchCalculator
description: Calculates the following oligonucleotide properties: Length, Optical Density, NMoles, Mass, Molecular Weight, Extinction Coefficient (using nearest neighbour method)
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Peptides
description: Advanced tools for analyzing collections of peptides.
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: PhyloTreeViewer
description: Phylogenetic trees visualization.
author: Davit Rizhinashvili

name: Plates
description: Assay plates: ingestion, storage, and analysis
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: PowerGrid
description: Power Grid contains popular spreadsheet extensions, such as [sparklines](#sparklines) and support for [images](#images).
author: Andrew Skalkin

name: PowerPack
description: Commonly used platform enhancements
author: Andrew Skalkin

name: PreclinicalCase
description: PreclinicalCase package
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Prism
description: Support for GraphPad Prism .prism files: import, preview, navigation, and visualization
author: Andrew Skalkin

name: PubChemApi
description: Integration with the PubChem web service.
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Pyodide
description: Provides support of python scripting directly in browser using Pyodide (https://pyodide.org/)
author: Pavlo Polovyi

name: Python
description: Python server for code execution and data processing
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: Reinvent4
description: Integrates Datagrok with REINVENT4 for advanced small molecule design and optimization
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: Retrosynthesis
description: Creates retrosynthesis paths for the selected molecule
author: Maria Dolotova

name: RevvitySignalsLink
description: Integration with RevvitySignals
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Samples
description: *Samples* contains sample [data connectors](https://datagrok.ai/help/access/databases/connectors/) and demonstrates [scripting](https://datagrok.ai/help/compute/scripting) and [notebooks](https://datagrok.ai/help/compute/jupyter-notebook) functionality.
author: Dmytro Kovalyov

name: SequenceTranslator
description: SequenceTranslator translates [oligonucleotide](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oligonucleotide) sequences between [different representations](https://github.com/datagrok-ai/public/tree/master/packages/SequenceTranslator#sequence-representations).

description: Integration with the Revvity Signals ELN
author: Andrew Skalkin

name: SQLite
description: Support for importing and previewing SQLite files.
author: Oleksandra Serhiienko

name: SureChembl
description: Performs patents searches through a locally deployed SureChEMBL database
author: Maria Dolotova

name: Tableau
description: Support for Tableau .twb workbook files: import and preview
author: Andrew Skalkin

name: TensorFlow.js
description: TensorFlow.js provides support for training and applying TensorFlow.js-based predictive models.

name: Tutorials
description: Learn and explore Datagrok through interactive tutorials and a demo app
author: Dmytro Kovalyov

description: Automated UI tests
author: Dmytro Kovalyov

name: UsageAnalysis
description: Platform usage analysis system

name: Widgets
